name: Moving Line
summary: A scroll-driven SVG line animation where a blue stroke draws downward as users scroll through content.
detailedDescription: Moving Line creates a vertical SVG line (1px wide, 1567px tall) that animates based on scroll progress. The component uses Framer Motion's useScroll hook tracking from 'end end' to 'start start' offset, converting scroll position to pathLength value (1 to 0). A spring animation (stiffness: 500, damping: 100) smooths the pathLength transition over 14s easeInOut. The SVG contains two paths: a static gradient stroke (blue #3879E7 fading from transparent at top to solid at bottom) and an animated solid blue path (var(--blue-500), 3px strokeWidth, round strokeLinecap). As users scroll, the animated path appears to draw downward from top to bottom. The line is positioned left of content columns (flex row with 10-unit gap), with dummy content blocks demonstrating the effect. This creates a visual progress indicator perfect for timelines, step-by-step guides, or long-form content where showing scroll progression enhances navigation and engagement.
purpose: Visualize scroll progress with animated line drawing
behavior: Tracks scroll position from end to start
Draws blue line downward on scroll
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
